title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
posterAlt: Lee Cronin's The Mummy (2026) movie poster
tmdbOverview: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.
synopsis: Lee Cronin's The Mummy is a 2026 horror and mystery film from United States. It carries a 6.2 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
